bead.title: Author docs/install/databricks-genie.md — install as a Genie skill bundle
bead.description:
Author docs/install/databricks-genie.md covering install of HELIX as a Databricks Code Genie skill bundle.

Sections:
1. Genie skill format overview (one-paragraph orientation; cite Databricks docs).
2. Bundle layout: how skills/helix/SKILL.md + workflows/ catalog map into a Genie skill bundle's expected structure.
3. Install path: upload/register the bundle in the Databricks workspace; permissions; where the catalog lives in the workspace filesystem.
4. Invocation: how a user asks Genie to align/frame/evolve — natural language; Genie's skill-routing model.
5. Verification: a small interaction that confirms Genie has loaded HELIX and can resolve the artifact catalog.
6. Caveats and known gaps vs Claude Code / Codex installs (e.g. file-write surface differences).

If specific Genie skill-bundle conventions are not yet public, write the doc against the documented Genie skill API surface and flag uncertain areas with a 'TODO: validate against current Genie docs' tag rather than guessing.
bead.acceptance: docs/install/databricks-genie.md exists. It covers bundle layout, install/registration, invocation, and verification. Any unresolved Genie API specifics are flagged as TODO rather than fabricated. The doc shares the same source content references (skills/helix/, workflows/) as the Claude Code and Codex install docs. Reachable from the install README index.
